title: Zooming Web Pages
drDigitalIntro: Some websites are hard to read if the text is tiny. You can zoom in with Ctrl+Plus to make everything bigger, or Ctrl+Minus to make it smaller. You can also pinch on the trackpad. Press Ctrl+0 to return to normal size. Each website remembers your zoom level, so when you return it's sized how you like it.

steps.say: Go to wikipedia.org — type it and press Enter. Imagine the text is too small to read comfortably.
Click the + zoom button twice to enlarge everything (or press Ctrl+Plus). Watch the page grow.

drDigitalSuccess: You zoomed in and the whole page got bigger and easier to read. Ctrl+Plus zooms in, Ctrl+Minus zooms out, Ctrl+0 resets.
drDigitalHint: Find the zoom control on the right of the action bar and click the + twice to reach 150%.
